# Feature: Store Abstraction Layer

> Feature ID: FEAT-001
> Status: 🔵 active
> Created: 2026-04-12T11:14:43Z

## Description

A backend-agnostic store interface with a filesystem implementation, enabling future DB migration without changing tool call sites.

## Requirements

- store.cjs exports a clean interface + FSImpl covering full CRUD for all five entities (Sprint, Task, Bug, Event, Feature)
- All store-CRUDing tools (validate-store.cjs, collate.cjs, seed-store.cjs, estimate-usage.cjs) use the facade — no direct fs calls on store paths
- validate-store --fix mutations go through facade write methods
- No changes to .forge/store/ directory layout or file format
- Node.js built-ins only — no new npm dependencies
